Senior Blockchain Engineer

We are looking for an experienced blockchain engineer to join our team building
decentralized infrastructure for Southeast Asian financial markets.

Requirements:
- 3+ years Solidity / EVM smart contract development
- Experience with DeFi protocols (AMMs, lending, stablecoins)
- Strong understanding of Solana or Cosmos ecosystem is a plus
- Proven track record shipping production Web3 products
- Korean language proficiency preferred for regional work

Responsibilities:
- Design and audit smart contracts
- Build on-chain integrations for our partner protocols
- Collaborate with the product team on tokenomics design
